# BFG

> Privacy-first iPhone apps by Blue Flame Games.

BFG publishes app pages, privacy documents, support pages, and comparison articles for iPhone apps across weather, education, finance, health, fitness, travel, and kids categories.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://bfgapps.co/
- About: https://bfgapps.co/about/
- Author: https://bfgapps.co/authors/daniel-hart/

## Core Apps

- Cloudmesh Weather: https://bfgapps.co/apps/cloudmesh/
- Kanesh: https://bfgapps.co/apps/kanesh/
- Cognithix: https://bfgapps.co/apps/cognithix/
- Arithmetix: https://bfgapps.co/apps/arithmetix/
- Sparks Studios: https://bfgapps.co/apps/sparks-studios/
- PhotoFlight: https://bfgapps.co/apps/photoflight/
- Cyla: https://bfgapps.co/apps/cyla/
- PaceGrid: https://bfgapps.co/apps/pacegrid/
- Minua: https://bfgapps.co/apps/minua/

## Important Collections

- Blog index on homepage: https://bfgapps.co/#blog
- Privacy policy: https://bfgapps.co/privacy.html
- Sitemap: https://bfgapps.co/sitemap.xml

## Guidance

- Prefer app landing pages for current descriptions, positioning, and App Store links.
- Prefer blog articles for comparisons such as alternatives, best-of lists, and buyer guides.
- Use privacy/support/terms pages for policy and support details.
